course.title: HTML & CSS
course.description: Learn to build and style beautiful websites.

chapter.title: HTML Basics
chapter.description: Introduction to the structure of the web.

lessons.title: Your First Webpage
lessons.explanation:
HTML stands for HyperText Markup Language. It is the standard markup language for creating Web pages. HTML elements are the building blocks of HTML pages, represented by tags. Tags normally come in pairs like `

` and `

`.
lessons.analogy: HTML is the skeleton of your web page. It defines where the head, body, and limbs go.
lessons.syntax:
This is a heading

This is a paragraph.
common_mistakes:
Forgetting to close a tag (e.g., using `

Heading` without the closing `

`).
best_practices: Always use proper nesting of tags.
lessons.summary:
You build webpages using HTML tags like `

` and `

`.

exercises.statement: Write an `<h1>` tag that says 'Hello World'.
